proven.claim: PROVEN: console.log() with no arguments is unconditionally safe
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 135
; PROVEN: console.log() with no arguments is unconditionally safe
(declare-const argument_count Int)    ; number of arguments passed to console.log
(declare-const call_can_throw Int)    ; 1 = invocation can raise an exception
; Code transition: console.log() — zero arguments in the call expression
(assert (= argument_count 0))
; Code transition: console.log() with no args prints a newline; no field access, no coercion
(assert (=> (= argument_count 0) (= call_can_throw 0)))
; Negation: call throws
(assert (= call_can_throw 1))
(check-sat)
